# ChinaWebFoundry

> WordPress agency based in Shanghai. We build and maintain WordPress websites for international brands operating in mainland China. Senior team, 15+ years of digital experience in China, native Chinese speakers, no offshore handover.

ChinaWebFoundry handles strategy, ICP filing, China hosting on Alibaba Cloud, Baidu SEO, native Chinese content, AI-search visibility on DeepSeek/Doubao/Kimi/Wenxin, mobile-first UX shaped for Chinese reading habits, plugin and theme work, migrations, and ongoing maintenance. We work end-to-end on a single WordPress (or Astro) stack so brands have one team accountable for the whole China web presence.

## English pages

- [Home](https://chinawebfoundry.com/): Agency overview, 15+ years of digital experience in China, services across Plan / Build / Grow / Run
- [Services](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/): Full service list with the 9 individual service pages below
- [Strategy & Audit](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/strategy-audit/): Pre-launch China web strategy and existing-site audits
- [UX & UI Design](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/ux-ui-design/): Mobile-first design adapted for Chinese reading and scanning behaviour
- [Chinese Content](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/chinese-content/): Native copywriting, transcreation, editorial calendars built around Chinese commercial dates
- [Technical Integration](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/technical-integration/): WeChat, Alipay, Baidu Maps, Aliyun Object Storage, mainland CDN integration
- [Baidu SEO](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/baidu-seo/): Baidu ranking, AI-engine visibility (Wenxin X1, DeepSeek), zhanzhang submission
- [GEO / AI Search](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/geo/): Visibility in DeepSeek, Doubao, Kimi, and Baidu's AI answer layer
- [China Hosting](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/china-hosting/): Alibaba Cloud ECS in mainland China, ICP-licensed, 24/7 monitored
- [China Migration](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/china-migration/): Moving an existing WordPress site into mainland infrastructure with ICP filing
- [Plugins & Extensions](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/plugins-extensions/): Custom WordPress plugins and theme work for Chinese-market needs
- [Maintenance & Support](https://chinawebfoundry.com/services/maintenance-support/): Ongoing care plans for sites running inside mainland infrastructure

## Knowledge pages (decision-maker context)

- [WordPress in China](https://chinawebfoundry.com/wordpress/): How WordPress runs behind the Great Firewall, what to change, FAQ
- [Astro in China](https://chinawebfoundry.com/astro/): When Astro beats WordPress for the China context
- [WeChat for the Web](https://chinawebfoundry.com/wechat/): Web touch points that connect to WeChat (Mini Programs, OA, payments)
- [China Site Scanner](https://chinawebfoundry.com/china-site-scanner/): Free check on how an existing site loads from mainland China
- [Who We Are](https://chinawebfoundry.com/who-we-are/): Team and how the agency works
- [Contact](https://chinawebfoundry.com/contact/): Shanghai office, email, WeChat

## Case studies (real client work)

- [Bassetti, life sciences](https://chinawebfoundry.com/work/bassetti-wordpress-china/): Bassetti's regulated-industry WordPress site, named technical lead, 6-week relaunch
- [IMHOF, Swiss luxury watches](https://chinawebfoundry.com/work/imhof-woocommerce-china/): WooCommerce build for Chinese luxury watch buyers
- [Zeinley, bilingual brand](https://chinawebfoundry.com/work/zeinley-bilingual-wordpress/): Bilingual EN/ZH site running in mainland infrastructure
- [Techne, B2B engineering](https://chinawebfoundry.com/work/techne-wordpress-china/): B2B WordPress for an engineering firm
- [VCLS, regulatory consulting](https://chinawebfoundry.com/work/vcls-china-website/): Regulatory consultancy in life sciences
- [SNF, water treatment](https://chinawebfoundry.com/work/snf-china-wordpress/): WordPress in mainland China for an industrial chemicals leader
- [NETK5, IT services](https://chinawebfoundry.com/work/netk5-wordpress-china/): IT services firm WordPress in mainland China

## Guides (China web playbook)

- [Website Hosting in China](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/china-website-hosting-guide/): Mainland vs Hong Kong vs overseas, Alibaba/Tencent/Huawei comparison, CDN inside China
- [Baidu SEO Ranking](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/baidu-seo-ranking-in-china/): How Baidu actually ranks pages, what differs from Google
- [Baidu Keyword Research Tools](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/baidu-keyword-research-tools/): Baidu Index, Keyword Planner, what to use and how
- [China Search Landscape Beyond Baidu](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/china-search-landscape-beyond-baidu/): Sogou, 360, AI engines, market share
- [The Great Firewall: What It Blocks](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/great-firewall-what-it-blocks/): Practical list of blocked services and the workarounds that hold up
- [ICP Licence Filing for Foreign Companies](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/icp-licence-filing-foreign-companies/): Bei'an process, sponsor company requirements, realistic timelines
- [China Website Localisation](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/china-website-localisation/): Beyond translation, what the cultural rebuild covers
- [Mobile-First Design for China](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/mobile-first-design-china/): What WeChat-native users expect from a web page
- [China Content Marketing Strategy](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/china-content-marketing-strategy/): Editorial planning around Chinese consumer rhythm
- [PIPL and DSL Data Privacy](https://chinawebfoundry.com/resources/china-web-guide/china-data-privacy-pipl-dsl/): Compliance for foreign sites collecting Chinese user data

## French version

A full French-language version of the site sits under [/fr/](https://chinawebfoundry.com/fr/) for Francophone decision-makers. Page structure and content match the English version one to one, written natively in French rather than machine-translated.

Questions, project briefs, or audit requests: hello@beyondbordergroup.com or via [the contact page](https://chinawebfoundry.com/contact/).
